title: hieracium alatum subsp. thalianum
intro: Hieracium alatum subsp. thalianum, also known as hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Hieracium alatum subsp. thalianum include its use as a diuretic, to treat skin conditions and wounds, and as an anti-inflammatory. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an antimicrobial agent, making it a valuable remedy for various health concerns. Traditionally, Hieracium alatum subsp. thalianum has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
